category_sources: source_facts.description says it is the Uplink CLI for the Storj network; official Storj docs describe Uplink CLI as a command-line app for object storage buckets and objects.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is storj-uplink; official Storj docs call the tool Uplink CLI.
docs_sources: Official Storj documentation provides Uplink CLI API reference and quickstart tutorial.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/storj/storj; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Storj docs describe command-line object and bucket management for Storj storage.
